kept.text:
JEFF BEZOS WAS DRIVING A 1996 HONDA ACCORD WHEN HIS NET WORTH HIT $10 BILLION

In a CNBC interview from the late 1990s, the host asked him:

"What's with the Honda?"

His answer: "This is a perfectly good car."

At the time, Amazon $AMZN had just crossed $30 billion in market cap, larger than Texaco.

Today, Amazon's market cap is $2.79 trillion.

A $10,000 investment in the Amazon IPO in 1997 would be worth approximately $35 million today.

quoted_tweet.text:
AMAZON $AMZN JUST REPORTED Q1 EARNINGS - EXTENDED VERSION

- Net Sales: $181.5B vs $177.3B est 🟢 (+17% YoY)
- Operating Income: $23.9B (vs $18.4B in Q1 2025)
- Net Income: $30.3B (vs $17.1B in Q1 2025)
- Diluted EPS: $2.78 (vs $1.59 in Q1 2025)

Segment breakdown:
- AWS Sales: $37.6B (+28% YoY, fastest growth in 15 quarters)
- AWS Operating Income: $14.2B (vs $11.5B in Q1 2025)
- North America Sales: $104.1B (+12% YoY)
- North America Operating Income: $8.3B (vs $5.8B in Q1 2025)
- International Sales: $39.8B (+19% YoY)
- International Operating Income: $1.4B (vs $1.0B in Q1 2025)

Cash flow (trailing twelve months):
- Operating Cash Flow: $148.5B (+30% YoY)
- Free Cash Flow: $1.2B (vs $25.9B in the prior year period)
- The decline was driven by a $59.3B YoY increase in property and equipment purchases, primarily reflecting investments in artificial intelligence

Q2 guidance:
- Anticipates an unfavorable impact of approximately 10 basis points from foreign exchange rates

Andy Jassy on the quarter: "We're in the middle of some of the biggest inflections of our lifetime, we're well positioned to lead, and I'm very optimistic about what's ahead for our customers and Amazon."

Other notable items:
- Q1 net income includes $16.8B pre-tax gains from Amazon's investments in Anthropic
- Amazon's chips business (Graviton, Trainium, Nitro) topped a $20B annual revenue run rate, growing triple-digit percentages YoY
- OpenAI committed to consume approximately 2 GW of Trainium capacity through AWS infrastructure, ramping in 2027
- Anthropic will secure up to 5 GW of current and future generation Trainium chips
- Amazon landed 2.1M+ AI chips over the past 12 months, more than half were Trainium
- Announced 1M+ NVIDIA $NVDA GPUs to be deployed starting in 2026
- Advertising grew to over $70B in TTM revenue
- Project Hail Mary has grossed nearly $615M at the global box office
- Announced planned acquisition of Globalstar for Amazon Leo's satellite network
